line_items.scope: Civil work — foundation, slab, masonry walls
Exterior — terrace paving, site drainage, landscaping

bids.notes: Local contractor with 12 years in Los Cabos. Strong coastal construction experience. References available. Excludes permit fees and topographic survey.

line_items.scope: Civil work — foundation, slab, masonry walls
Exterior — terrace paving, site drainage, landscaping

bids.notes: Larger regional firm. Slightly higher cost but stronger project management structure. Excludes permit fees.

recommendation_rationale: Constructora Horizonte Los Cabos at $192,000 USD is the lower bid by $6,000 and is within the client budget of $200,000 USD with a $8,000 contingency. Both bidders are qualified local contractors. Horizonte has demonstrated coastal construction experience and a competitive timeline of 11 months. Both bids confirm the revised 160 sqm no-pool scope is viable within the client's budget.
